{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Bey Herrn Johannes Christ seel. Frau Wittib ist zu haben: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Arnds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Passions- und Oster-Predigten</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 2.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Predigten von denen Egyptischen Plagen</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> <PRIZE>24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stahiii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Fundamenta Chymiae dogmat. rat. & experim.</TITLE> <VOLUME>Pars II.</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 1. 30. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Poetevin</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Nouvelie Grammaire Francoise & Allemande</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> <PRIZE>32. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maiers der Geistl.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Krancken Geistl. oder Seelen-Cur.</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> <PRIZE>48. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hau\u00df-Gebett-Buch, mit grober Schrifft</TITLE>, <VOLUME>2. Theile</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> <PRIZE>40. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":6,"explanation":"Corrections made:
1. Fixed mismatched tag <PRICE> to <PRIZE> in the Stahiii bibliographic entry (opening tag was PRICE but closing was PRIZE).
2. Removed stray/garbled characters "√ü" and "√†" that appeared to be encoding artifacts scattered throughout the text (before PRIZE tags, in "Pa√üions" and "Hau√ü").
3. Corrected "Pa√üions" to "Passions" (likely OCR/encoding corruption of "Passions").
4. Corrected "Hau√ü-Gebett-Buch" to "Hauß-Gebett-Buch" (using proper eszett character instead of corrupted encoding).
5. Removed extraneous "√†" symbols that appeared before several PRIZE tags with no clear structural or semantic purpose.
6. Ensured consistent tag naming (PRIZE) throughout all BIBL entries for the price element."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>Bey Herrn Johannes Christ seel. Frau Wittib ist zu haben: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Arnds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Passions- und Oster-Predigten</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 2.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Predigten von denen Egyptischen Plagen</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> <PRIZE>24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stahiii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Fundamenta Chymiae dogmat. rat. & experim.</TITLE> <VOLUME>Pars II.</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 1. 30. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Poetevin</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Nouvelie Grammaire Francoise & Allemande</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> <PRIZE>32. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maiers der Geistl.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Krancken Geistl. oder Seelen-Cur.</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> <PRIZE>48. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hau\u00df-Gebett-Buch, mit grober Schrifft</TITLE>, <VOLUME>2. Theile</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> <PRIZE>40. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
Corrections made:
1. Fixed mismatched tag <PRICE> to <PRIZE> in the Stahiii bibliographic entry (opening tag was PRICE but closing was PRIZE).
2. Removed stray/garbled characters "√ü" and "√†" that appeared to be encoding artifacts scattered throughout the text (before PRIZE tags, in "Pa√üions" and "Hau√ü").
3. Corrected "Pa√üions" to "Passions" (likely OCR/encoding corruption of "Passions").
4. Corrected "Hau√ü-Gebett-Buch" to "Hauß-Gebett-Buch" (using proper eszett character instead of corrupted encoding).
5. Removed extraneous "√†" symbols that appeared before several PRIZE tags with no clear structural or semantic purpose.
6. Ensured consistent tag naming (PRIZE) throughout all BIBL entries for the price element.
